---
title: "March Madness 2026 - Standardized BT Model"
format: html
editor: visual
execute: 
  eval: false
---


# 1. 环境准备与数据加载
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(tidyr)

base_path <- "/Users/sly/Desktop/MarchMadness/archive/"

matchups <- read_csv("/Users/sly/Desktop/MarchMadness/2026_Potential_Matchups.csv")
team_rankings <- read_csv(paste0(base_path, "TeamRankings.csv"))
evan_miya <- read_csv(paste0(base_path, "EvanMiya.csv"))
heat_check <- read_csv(paste0(base_path, "Heat Check Ratings.csv"))
team_results <- read_csv(paste0(base_path, "Team Results.csv")) 

matchups <- matchups %>%
  mutate(
    HigherSeed = case_when(
      HigherSeed == "Wright St" ~ "Wright State",
      HigherSeed == "Utah St" ~ "Utah State",
      HigherSeed == "Tennessee St" ~ "Tennessee State",
      HigherSeed == "St Louis" ~ "Saint Louis",
      HigherSeed == "N Dakota St" ~ "North Dakota State", 
      HigherSeed == "Kennesaw" ~ "Kennesaw State",
      HigherSeed == "Queens NC" ~ "Queens",
      TRUE ~ HigherSeed
    ),
    LowerSeed = case_when(
      LowerSeed == "Wright St" ~ "Wright State",
      LowerSeed == "Utah St" ~ "Utah State",
      LowerSeed == "Tennessee St" ~ "Tennessee State",
      LowerSeed == "St Louis" ~ "Saint Louis",
      LowerSeed == "N Dakota St" ~ "North Dakota State", 
      LowerSeed == "Kennesaw" ~ "Kennesaw State",
      LowerSeed == "Queens NC" ~ "Queens",
      TRUE ~ LowerSeed
    )
  )
```

# 2. 多维特征
```{r}
historical_beta <- team_rankings %>%
  filter(YEAR >= 2024) %>%
  mutate(TR_RATING = as.numeric(`TR RATING`)) %>%
  group_by(TEAM) %>%
  summarize(Beta_Score = mean(TR_RATING, na.rm = TRUE))

current_bpr <- evan_miya %>%
  filter(YEAR == max(YEAR)) %>% 
  select(TEAM, `RELATIVE RATING`) %>%
  rename(BPR = `RELATIVE RATING`) %>%
  distinct(TEAM, .keep_all = TRUE)

momentum_score <- heat_check %>%
  filter(YEAR == max(YEAR)) %>% 
  mutate(Recent_Form = as.numeric(`DARK HORSE`) + as.numeric(`UPSET ALERT`) + as.numeric(`CINDERELLA`)) %>%
  select(TEAM, Recent_Form) %>%
  distinct(TEAM, .keep_all = TRUE)

tourney_pedigree <- team_results %>%
  select(TEAM, PAKE) %>%
  group_by(TEAM) %>%
  summarize(Team_PAKE = mean(PAKE, na.rm = TRUE))

team_tempo <- evan_miya %>%
  filter(YEAR == max(YEAR)) %>%
  select(TEAM, `TRUE TEMPO`) %>%
  rename(Tempo = `TRUE TEMPO`) %>%
  distinct(TEAM, .keep_all = TRUE)

all_tourney_teams <- data.frame(TEAM = unique(c(matchups$HigherSeed, matchups$LowerSeed)))

team_master_stats <- all_tourney_teams %>%
  left_join(historical_beta, by = "TEAM") %>%
  left_join(current_bpr, by = "TEAM") %>%
  left_join(momentum_score, by = "TEAM") %>%
  left_join(tourney_pedigree, by = "TEAM") %>%
  left_join(team_tempo, by = "TEAM") %>%
  mutate(
    Beta_Score = ifelse(is.na(Beta_Score), mean(Beta_Score, na.rm = TRUE), Beta_Score),
    BPR = ifelse(is.na(BPR), mean(BPR, na.rm = TRUE), BPR),
    Recent_Form = ifelse(is.na(Recent_Form), 0, Recent_Form),
    Team_PAKE = ifelse(is.na(Team_PAKE), 0, Team_PAKE),
    Tempo = ifelse(is.na(Tempo), mean(Tempo, na.rm = TRUE), Tempo)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    # Z-Score 标准化
    Z_BPR = scale(BPR)[, 1],
    Z_Beta = scale(Beta_Score)[, 1],
    Z_Form = scale(Recent_Form)[, 1],
    Z_PAKE = scale(Team_PAKE)[, 1],
    Z_Tempo = scale(Tempo)[, 1], 
    
    # 核心实力潜变量 Lambda
    Lambda = (0.45 * Z_BPR) + (0.35 * Z_Beta) + (0.10 * Z_Form) + (0.10 * Z_PAKE)
  )
```

# 3. 动态温度 BT 模型
```{r}
final_predictions <- matchups %>%
  left_join(team_master_stats, by = c("HigherSeed" = "TEAM")) %>%
  rename(High_Lambda = Lambda, High_Tempo = Z_Tempo) %>%
  
  left_join(team_master_stats, by = c("LowerSeed" = "TEAM")) %>%
  rename(Low_Lambda = Lambda, Low_Tempo = Z_Tempo) %>%
  
  mutate(
    Delta_Lambda = High_Lambda - Low_Lambda,
    Dynamic_c = case_when(
      HigherSeedNum <= 4 & LowerSeedNum >= 12 & Low_Tempo > 0.5 ~ 1.7 + (Low_Tempo * 0.2),
      TRUE ~ 1.7
    ),

    Dynamic_c = pmin(Dynamic_c, 2.2),
    
    Predictions = 1 / (1 + exp(-(Delta_Lambda / Dynamic_c)))
  ) %>%
  mutate(Predictions = ifelse(is.na(Predictions), 0.5, Predictions))
```

# 4. 文件保存
```{r}
submission <- final_predictions %>%
  select(HigherSeed, HigherSeedID, HigherSeedNum, 
         LowerSeed, LowerSeedID, LowerSeedNum, Predictions)

write_csv(submission, "2026_Standard_BT_Fixed.csv")
```
